verdict: Kiehl's retinol serum combines stabilized retinol with occlusive squalane for enhanced penetration and reduced irritation during nighttime use. The formulation balances efficacy with user tolerance, though retinol concentration remains undisclosed.

_research.name: Retinol Advanced Nighttime Serum
_research.con: Undisclosed retinol percentage limits comparison to standardized clinical formulations.
